summary: Frontend testing of Direct/Indirect cost split percentage feature in Accounts Board > Cashbook > Indirect tab completed successfully. All tests passed: Accountant sees read-only 'Set by Admin' text without edit capability, Super Admin sees Edit button and can change percentage inline, Budget Overview reflects updated percentages in rule labels and column headers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cost Split feature in Accounts Board > Cashbook > Indirect tab is fully working. Current percentage is 20% (reset after testing). Key data-testids: cashbook-indirect-tab, edit-cost-split-btn, cost-split-input, save-cost-split-btn, indirect-view-budget. Accountant sees 'Set by Admin' text (read-only), Super Admin can edit inline. Budget Overview shows dynamic 'X/Y Rule' and column headers.

accountant_tests.no_edit_button: PASS - Edit button correctly hidden for Accountant

super_admin_tests.budget_overview_75_25_rule: PASS - Table header shows 'Project-wise Budget (75/25 Rule)'

verified_features: Accountant can VIEW Cost Split bar in Accounts Board > Cashbook > Indirect tab
Accountant sees 'Set by Admin' text (read-only mode)
Accountant does NOT see Edit button
Super Admin sees Edit button next to Cost Split bar
Super Admin can click Edit, change percentage, and save
Save shows success toast with updated percentages
Cost Split bar updates immediately after save
Budget Overview shows dynamic 'X/Y Rule' in table header
Budget Overview shows dynamic 'X% Indirect Budget' in summary card
Budget Overview table shows 'Direct (X%)' and 'Indirect (Y%)' column headers
